name: azurerm_virtual_machine
description: The name of the virtual machine.
validText: Can't use spaces, control characters, or these characters: ~ ! @ # $ % ^ & * ( ) = + _ [ ] { } \ | ; : . ' " , < > / ? Windows VMs can't include periods or end with hyphens. Linux VMs can't end with periods or hyphens.

name: azurerm_linux_virtual_machine
description: The name of the Linux virtual machine.
validText: Can't use spaces, control characters, or these characters: ~ ! @ # $ % ^ & * ( ) = + _ [ ] { } \ | ; : . ' " , < > / ? Linux VMs can't end with periods or hyphens.

name: azurerm_windows_virtual_machine
description: The name of the Windows virtual machine.
validText: Can't use spaces, control characters, or these characters: ~ ! @ # $ % ^ & * ( ) = + _ [ ] { } \ | ; : . ' " , < > / ? Windows VMs can't include periods or end with hyphens.

name: azurerm_managed_disk
description: The name of the managed disk.
